title: More schooling leads to higher earnings in the labor market
subtitle: Typical wage premiums by education level
source: Wages expressed in PPP adjusted US dollars. World Bank staff calculations, based on data of GLD (Global Labor Database Repository); I2D2 (International Income Distribution Database) (internal database), World Bank
visdescription: Bar graph showing increase in earnings of workers with different education levels compared to those with less than primary schooling.
